HomePage.heroTitle: An elegant online presence for [Business name].
HomePage.heroDescription: Present services, strengths, and contact options in a clear, modern landing page ready for B&Bs, restaurants, professional studios, craftspeople, and local services.
HomePage.heroCardDescription: Replace copy, colors, and content to create a credible first version of the site without changing the architecture.
HomePage.heroDetail1Text: A readable, organized layout across phones, tablets, and desktops.
HomePage.heroDetail2Text: The existing form remains the single place to collect inquiries.
HomePage.servicesTitle: Three clear areas to present what you offer.
HomePage.servicesDescription: Use these cards to describe rooms, menus, consultations, craft work, appointment-based services, or local offers.
HomePage.service1Description: Describe the most important service with short, concrete copy focused on customer value.
HomePage.service2Description: Highlight what makes the business recognizable: atmosphere, method, specialty, or attention to detail.
HomePage.service3Description: Explain how to contact you, book, request a quote, or get more information.
HomePage.whyDescription: This section helps turn a visit into a concrete inquiry by showing simple, believable reasons to get in touch.
HomePage.benefit1Description: Content is organized so visitors quickly understand what you offer and how to reach you.
HomePage.benefit2Description: The page keeps a clean, professional style that works across different industries without feeling generic.
HomePage.benefit3Description: The structure can expand with pages, bookings, client areas, or editorial content.
HomePage.contactDescription: Use the form to receive questions, availability requests, quotes, or first commercial contacts.

ContactForm.title: Contact us
ContactForm.description: Fill in the form and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
ContactForm.name: Name
ContactForm.successDescription: Thank you for reaching out. We will get back to you soon.
ContactForm.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
